findings.rule_help: Remove executable, script, archive, or native-library files, or allow the extension explicitly for a reviewed scripted-pack workflow.
Remove executable, script, archive, or native-library files, or allow the extension explicitly for a reviewed scripted-pack workflow.

content_id_conflict.help: Use a unique content id, mark the file as an intentional override, or adjust the pack order.
content_id_conflict.title: Content id conflict

duplicate_content_id.help: Keep content ids unique across pack entries so content replacement is explicit.
duplicate_content_id.title: Duplicate content id

duplicate_file_path.help: Keep one manifest entry per shipped path so overrides are explicit.
duplicate_file_path.title: Duplicate file path

duplicate_pack_id.help: Give each pack a stable unique id so dependencies and overrides can be reviewed.
duplicate_pack_id.title: Duplicate pack id

load_order_conflict.help: Declare intentional overrides or change pack order so resource ownership is clear.
load_order_conflict.title: Load order conflict

missing_file_path.help: Every shipped resource entry needs a stable path for review and diffing.
missing_file_path.title: Missing file path

missing_pack_id.help: Add stable pack identity fields before publishing or comparing pack versions.
missing_pack_id.title: Missing pack id

missing_pack_version.help: Add stable pack identity fields before publishing or comparing pack versions.
missing_pack_version.title: Missing pack version

override_not_allowed.help: Pass --allow-overrides for expected patch packs, or remove the override declaration.
override_not_allowed.title: Override not allowed

pack_absolute_path.help: Use Godot project paths so pack reviews are portable across machines.
pack_absolute_path.title: Absolute path

pack_dependencies_not_list.help: Use a list of dependency objects such as {'id': 'base_pack'} or simple id strings.
pack_dependencies_not_list.title: Dependencies are not a list

pack_dependency_duplicate_id.help: Keep each dependency id once so release review is easier to read.
pack_dependency_duplicate_id.title: Duplicate dependency id

pack_dependency_missing.help: Add the dependency pack to the load-order command or remove the stale dependency.
pack_dependency_missing.title: Missing dependency pack

pack_dependency_missing_id.help: Give every dependency a stable id so load order checks can match it to another pack.
pack_dependency_missing_id.title: Dependency missing id

pack_dependency_order.help: Load dependency packs before packs that extend or override them.
pack_dependency_order.title: Dependency loaded too late

pack_dev_or_private_file.help: Review whether editor caches, logs, backups, tests, or key material should be shipped in the pack.
pack_dev_or_private_file.title: Development or private file

pack_duplicate_path_case_insensitive.help: Avoid case-only path differences because Windows and macOS users may see collisions.
pack_duplicate_path_case_insensitive.title: Case-insensitive path collision

pack_file_removed.help: Check whether the removal is intended before publishing the pack update.
pack_file_removed.title: Pack file removed

pack_non_res_path.help: Use stable project paths such as res://addons/example/file.tres in pack manifests.
pack_non_res_path.title: Non-res path

pack_path_traversal.help: Pack manifests should not contain paths that can escape the intended project tree.
pack_path_traversal.title: Path traversal

pack_self_dependency.help: Remove self-dependencies so load-order checks describe real pack relationships.
pack_self_dependency.title: Self dependency

pack_unsafe_file_type.help: Script, native binary, archive, and packed-project files can be legitimate, but review them before distribution.
pack_unsafe_file_type.title: Unsafe file type

restricted_pack_executable_file.help: Remove executable, script, archive, or native-library files, or allow the extension explicitly for a reviewed scripted-pack workflow.
restricted_pack_executable_file.title: Restricted pack executable file

unknown_base_reference.help: Check the base manifest or update the content pack dependency.
unknown_base_reference.title: Unknown base reference
